Table-Command: CREATE TABLE EnergyPrice(EnergyPriceId INT UNSIGNED NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,CurrentDate DATETIME,BestTimeToBuy INT UNSIGNED,BestTimeToSell INT UNSIGNED,PRIMARY KEY(EnergyPriceId));

CREATE TABLE DateAndPrice(DatePriceId INT UNSIGNED NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,Date DATETIME,Price FLOAT,EnergyPriceId INT UNSIGNED, FOREIGN KEY(EnergyPriceId) REFERENCES EnergyPrice(EnergyPriceId),PRIMARY KEY(DatePriceId));
ALTER TABLE EnergyPrice ADD CONSTRAINT fk_best_buy FOREIGN KEY (BestTimeToBuy) REFERENCES DateAndPrice(DatePriceId);
ALTER TABLE EnergyPrice ADD CONSTRAINT fk_best_sell FOREIGN KEY (BestTimeToSell) REFERENCES DateAndPrice(DatePriceId);
